scripts.build:deps: npm run build --workspace=@word-hunt/shared && npm run build --workspace=@word-hunt/db
scripts.build:realtime: npm run build:deps && npm run build --workspace=@word-hunt/realtime
scripts.build:web: npm run build:deps && npm run build --workspace=@word-hunt/web
scripts.dev: npm run build:deps && npm-run-all --parallel dev:realtime dev:web
scripts.build: npm run build:deps && npm run build --workspace=@word-hunt/realtime && npm run build --workspace=@word-hunt/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@word-hunt/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@word-hunt/db && npm run typecheck --workspace=@word-hunt/realtime && npm run typecheck --workspace=@word-hunt/web
